name: IndieWall
description:
Finally made this as I just got back from visiting family (Again), late Merry Christmas and possibly early Happy New Year. Not sure what I'm gonna do next, although there are a couple that I started earlier and never finished. Oh and for the description images this time around I could not get anything for Kirsche and Alana that looked good at all so I apologize for that.

So for the gens we got:

Dooby

Sameko Saba

Limealicious

Mint (Fatass) Fantome

Nimi Nightmare

Snuffy

She's the host so she's not in the wall but Filian

And then I'll just add some old gens of Kirsche and Alana since I wanted to add something

Kirsche Verstahl

SmugAlana

Anyways I'll figure out what to work on next but in the meantime hopefully this bot is good. Lemme know if there's any problems with it and I hope you enjoy it.
creator: Pandapple
